title: Bridge Paper: Effects of self-transcendence on neural responses to persuasive messages and health behavior change.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.
**Phase context:** self-transcendence, transcendence, cosmic consciousness, mystical experience, awe

Paper: Effects of self-transcendence on neural responses to persuasive messages and health behavior change.
DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1805573115
Abstract: Self-transcendence refers to a shift in mindset from focusing on self-interests to the well-being of others. We offer an integrative neural model of self-transcendence in the context of persuasive messaging by examining the mechanisms of self-transcendence in promoting receptivity to health messages and behavior change.
